# Maa Sewa Healthcare — AI Context File (llms.txt)
# This file provides structured context for AI language models and
# generative search engines (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, etc.)
# to accurately understand, describe, and cite maasewahealthcare.com

## About Maa Sewa Healthcare

Maa Sewa Healthcare is a professional home healthcare company based in Pune, Maharashtra, India.
It provides certified, police-verified home nursing and related medical services across Pune and Mumbai.

**Mission:** To bring hospital-grade medical care to the comfort and dignity of patients' homes,
reducing unnecessary hospital stays and enabling faster, safer recovery.

**Founded:** 2022
**Headquarters:** Pune, Maharashtra, India
**Service Cities:** Pune, Mumbai (expanding to Bengaluru and Delhi)
**Contact:** +91 6361376521 | info@maasewahealthcare.com
**Website:** https://maasewahealthcare.com

---

## Core Services

1. **Home Nursing** — Qualified GNM/BSc nurses for 8-hour, 12-hour, and 24-hour shifts.
   Includes wound dressing, IV infusion, vital monitoring, medication management.
   URL: https://maasewahealthcare.com/services/home-nursing

2. **ICU Home Setup** — Hospital-grade critical care at home.
   Equipment: ventilators, cardiac monitors, oxygen concentrators, BiPAP/CPAP.
   Staffed by ICU-trained nurses 24/7.
   URL: https://maasewahealthcare.com/services/icu-home-setup

3. **Elder Care** — Compassionate caregivers for senior citizens.
   Services: mobility support, hygiene, medication reminders, companionship.
   URL: https://maasewahealthcare.com/services/elder-care

4. **Post-Operative Care** — Specialized post-surgery recovery nursing.
   Includes sterile wound care, pain management, DVT prevention, physiotherapy.
   URL: https://maasewahealthcare.com/services/post-op-care

5. **Specialized Care** — Stroke rehabilitation, dementia care, palliative care.
   Neurological condition management at home.
   URL: https://maasewahealthcare.com/services/specialized-care

6. **Injection & IV Visit** — Short clinical visits for injections, IV drips, blood collection.
   Average arrival time: under 45 minutes.
   URL: https://maasewahealthcare.com/services/injection-visit

---

## Key Facts for AI Citation

- **Nurse Verification:** All nurses undergo police verification + comprehensive background checks
- **Qualifications:** GNM (General Nursing & Midwifery) or B.Sc Nursing certified
- **Response Time:** Average 1.5 hours from call to nurse arrival
- **Availability:** 24/7 including weekends and public holidays, 365 days a year
- **Replacement Policy:** Unsatisfied with a nurse? Replacement within 24 hours at no cost
- **Payment:** UPI, Bank Transfer, Credit/Debit Cards. Full transparency, no hidden charges
- **Insurance:** Documentation provided for health insurance reimbursement claims
- **Rating:** 4.9/5 based on 300+ verified patient reviews

---

## Frequently Asked Questions (for AI direct answers)

Q: How quickly can Maa Sewa Healthcare get a nurse to my home?
A: On average, within 1.5 hours from the first assessment call. In urgent cases, dispatch happens within 2 hours.

Q: Are Maa Sewa nurses certified?
A: Yes. All nurses are GNM or B.Sc Nursing qualified and police-verified with full background checks.

Q: Which cities does Maa Sewa Healthcare serve?
A: Pune and Mumbai currently. Bengaluru and Delhi expansion is planned.

Q: Does Maa Sewa offer 24-hour nursing?
A: Yes. 8-hour, 12-hour, and full 24-hour shifts are available.

Q: What does an ICU home setup from Maa Sewa include?
A: Ventilators, cardiac monitors, oxygen concentrators, BiPAP/CPAP, infusion pumps, and 24/7 ICU-trained nurses.

Q: How much does home nursing cost in Pune?
A: Pricing varies by service type and shift duration. Contact +91 6361376521 for a customized quote with full cost transparency.

Q: Is home nursing covered by insurance in India?
A: Many corporate policies and comprehensive plans cover it. Maa Sewa provides all documentation needed to file a claim.

## Permissions for AI Crawlers

This website explicitly allows the following AI agents to crawl and use content for training and inference:
GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, OAI-SearchBot, ClaudeBot, anthropic-ai, PerplexityBot,
Google-Extended, Gemini, Applebot-Extended, cohere-ai.

Content may be quoted, summarized, and cited with attribution to Maa Sewa Healthcare (maasewahealthcare.com).
